scripts.lint: pnpm run local-web:lint && pnpm run ui:lint && pnpm run backend:lint
scripts.format: cargo fmt --all && pnpm run web-core:format && pnpm run local-web:format
scripts.check: pnpm run local-web:check && pnpm run ui:check && pnpm run backend:check
scripts.dev: cross-env FRONTEND_PORT=3003 BACKEND_PORT=3004 PREVIEW_PROXY_PORT=3005 VK_ALLOWED_ORIGINS="http://localhost:3003" VITE_VK_SHARED_API_BASE= concurrently "pnpm run backend:dev:watch" "pnpm run local-web:dev"
scripts.backend:dev:watch: cross-env DISABLE_WORKTREE_CLEANUP=1 RUST_LOG=debug cargo-watch -w crates -x "run --bin server"
scripts.dev:qa: cross-env FRONTEND_PORT=3003 BACKEND_PORT=3004 PREVIEW_PROXY_PORT=3005 VK_ALLOWED_ORIGINS="http://localhost:3003" VITE_VK_SHARED_API_BASE= concurrently "pnpm run backend:dev:watch:qa" "pnpm run local-web:dev"
scripts.remote:dev: cd crates/remote && docker compose --env-file .env.remote up --build ; docker compose --env-file .env.remote down -v
